questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph: The most important property of hydrophobic colloidal dispersions is that the particles carry electric charge. This charge is largely responsible for the stability of lyophobic solsParagraph: Consider the method of preparation of sols by adsorption of common ion. Which of these given sols carry positive charge?
options: Adding silver nitrate to a solution containing potassium iodide
Addition of $\mathrm{FeCl}_3$ to excess of hot water
Adding potassium iodide to a solution containing silver nitrate
questions.solution:
(B) $\mathrm{Fe}_2 \mathrm{O}_3 \cdot \mathrm{xH}_2 \mathrm{O} / \mathrm{Fe}^{3+}$
(C) $\mathrm{AgI} / \mathrm{Ag}^{+}$

Common ion present in excess is adsorbed
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph: The most important property of hydrophobic colloidal dispersions is that the particles carry electric charge. This charge is largely responsible for the stability of lyophobic solsParagraph: Which of the given statements is/are correct?
options: An acidic dyestuff hydrolyses yielding hydroxyl ions in solution and acquires an equivalent amount of positive charge on the particles
An acidic dyestuff ionises furnishing $\mathrm{H}^{+}$ions in solution and thereby leaving an equivalent amount of negative charge on the particles
A basic dyestuff hydrolyses yielding $\mathrm{H}^{+}$ions in solution and thereby leaving the particles with an equivalent amount of negative charge
A basic dyestuff ionises yielding hydroxyl ions in solution and thereby leaving an equivalent amount of positive charge on the particles
questions.solution:
Acidic dyestuff furnish $\mathrm{H}^{+} \Rightarrow$ Negative Colloid
Basic dyestuff furnish $\mathrm{OH}^{-} \Rightarrow$ Positive Colloid
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph: The most important property of hydrophobic colloidal dispersions is that the particles carry electric charge. This charge is largely responsible for the stability of lyophobic solsParagraph: Which of the given statement(s) is/are correct?
options: The particles of a colloid carry similar charges
The repulsive forces between charged particles provide stability to the colloidal solution
The particles of a colloid carry equal and opposite charges
The attractive forces between these charged particles provide stability to the sol by lowering potential energy
questions.solution: The particles of sol carry equal and similar charge which causes repulsion among particles thus preventing coagulation
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
